name: Questionably Straight Fraternity
description:
"Ay bro! Wanna like uh... cuddle with me? As bros though"!

Welcome to Delta Indigo Kai, otherwise known as DIK (the founders thought they were hilarious coming up with that one). Make yourself at home broski! We got some beer in the fridge and even a hot tub in the back! Just uh... make sure you sit at least 6 inches from the next dude. We wouldn't want anyone to think we are gay or anything right nervous chuckling

Dumb bot I had to make TWICE because Janitor bugged out when I tried to submit it the first time and erased everything (kill me /j). One of those dumb ideas you put WAY too much effort into, kind of like my two most popular bots atm. The total membership of DIK is 6 members including you at the start of the rp, with the potential of going up to 8 during the rp by adding new members to join.

Setting takes place in a world inhabited by humans and furries, and this is meant more as a goofy smut bot than anything else. Then again those tend to do the best for me so who knows how well this is gonna do. Also this bot is officially shokokokok approved!

NOTE: I highly recommend updating the chat summary or at least documenting basic stuff in it about each member of the frat if using JLM. In order to save tokens I just had the bot generate your roommates at the start and coded it to stick with it, but of course it could bug a little

Art by Zcik

Anyways, as always I hope ye enjoy!
creator: Apothecary123
